entries.en: Added admin login and session APIs plus a sign-in flow in `apps/web`, with configurable local development credentials.
entries.zh-CN: 新增管理员登录与会话 API，并在 `apps/web` 中接入登录流程，支持可配置的本地开发账号。

entries.en: Merchant provider configuration can now be managed per app, which removes the need to start `apps/web` for the default `alipay_page` quickstart path.
entries.zh-CN: 商户渠道配置现在支持按 app 维度管理，默认 `alipay_page` quickstart 路径不再要求先启动 `apps/web`。
